global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with promotional text and product placeholders.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on products.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ThreadMark' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Image placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center with a light background, suggesting a placeholder for product images.

elements.label: Image placeholder
elements.description: Another rectangular area in the center, similar to the previous one, indicating more product images.

elements.label: Image placeholder
elements.description: A third rectangular area in the center, consistent with the other placeholders for product images.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular area at the bottom center, possibly representing a user-generated content icon.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' in a prominent position, capturing attention.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text '€19.99 Learn more' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in a bright color, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'UGC' in a circular shape, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that does not fit into the other categories, possibly decorative.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, product images are centered, the headline is prominent in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
